IMPORTANT CHARTS 13
The disciple wants to know why here importance is given to Jupiter
which is not the case usually as the question of livelihood is considered from
Saturn's movements in most ofthe cases.
The Master answers while work done is the result of Saturn,
the enjoyment of the result is ascribed to Jupiter who represents the soul.
The transit , of Jupiter oh the Sun and Venus was transmitted by them
to Saturn placed in the 2nd house to them (owned by Venus also)
and this leads to vitalizing Saturn conjuct Mercury which shapes the
life by offel;ing_ a high post in a Government Engineering College.
This is further augmented by the fact that Jupiter contacts the Moon
and natal Jupiter in the next house. These dispositions bestow an exalted
position to the native.
